name: Joe (personal)
subject: It's a coin-flip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
After all, no one thought we'd win in 2012. But thanks to the support of our grassroots team, we made it happen. |
---

| | Here's the deal, Peter --

The pollsters are calling this race a toss-up, and that means we've got an equally good chance of losing as we do of winning. I've heard that before, though. After all, no one thought we'd win in 2012. But thanks to the support of our grassroots team, we made it happen.

And just like in 2012, I'm not taking anything for granted. My opponent may have a boatload of cash, but I've got something better: the hardest-working team in politics. We are putting in the hours to earn every single vote.

In a race as close as this one, it's you, and people like you, who will really make the difference -- so I'm asking you to make that difference now, just like our supporters did in 2012. **[Will you pitch in to help us turn this toss-up into a WIN on Election Day?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21bd/7377f838/3c4aa0df/51f93e74/3432838273/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20180610-tossup?refcode=20180610nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,
Joe | **[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21bd/7377f838/3c4aa0df/51f93e77/3432838273/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20180610-tossup?refcode=20180610nd&amount=25")**

name: Scott Holmlund
subject: I know Mel will champion LGBT equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friend,

I worked with Mel Hall when he was CEO of Press Ganey, a company that helps hospitals improve patient care.

At the time, I mentioned to Mel that Press Ganey did not have benefits for same-sex couples, which meant my partner Alex and I couldn't share in the benefits granted to other employees. Within one week, Mel changed the company's policy and added benefits for same-sex couples.

[**I 've seen Mel support the LGBT community in a direct way and I know that he'll be a champion for equality in Congress. This Pride weekend, contribute $5 to elect Mel Hall.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/M3xAy_FH1zzKFK7PqMG4KZFVYVFGC3W_WfScYUErxpM=/GXgmI2gmi9YL54I10HZFEy57YaVTJszjq0TkOhuKQZk=?refcode=em180610)

Just yesterday, at the Indiana GOP convention, Republicans voted to include language in their party's platform declaring that marriage should be between a man and a woman.

It's clear that Indiana Republicans are out of touch and want to drag our state backwards on the progress we've made for LGBT Americans like myself.

Our opponent, Jackie Walorski, has even pushed legislation allowing anti-LGBT discrimination in federal agencies.

**I can 't think of a better replacement for Jackie and the Indiana GOP's anti-equality agenda than Mel Hall. Mel is counting on supporters like us -- will you join me in contributing $5 to power his campaign today?**

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Gainesville, Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Dear friends,
Yesterday, we held a town hall in Gainesville in Cooke County. The 254th county we've been lucky enough to visit over the last year and a half.
Yesterday in Gainesville it was music (thanks, Isaac!), hot dogs, lemonade, cake and fried pies. The historic Santa Fe train depot, where Harry Truman made his last speech in Texas during his whistle-stop tour in '48. Same depot where four years earlier an entire division boarded the trains that would take them the first leg of their journey to England. And ultimately across the channel to storm the beaches at Omaha on D-Day.
A depot full of people in chairs, standing along the wall, listening from outside through the open doors -- big smiles, flags, signs, kids and dogs.
**Energy and electricity in the air.**
We talked about the moment of truth that we face as a country and the leadership that Texas is going to provide. The courage, the strength and the big heart that will overcome the pettiness, the smallness, the paranoia and the fear.
As Truman reminded us way back when: "America was not built on fear. America was built on courage, on imagination and an unbeatable determination to do the job at hand."
We, the people of Texas -- the people in the train depot in Gainesville, Cooke County -- are the people he was talking about.
**We are a match for this moment of truth. Ready to do the job at hand.**
My friend Jay, who made the trip from Austin with Chrissy and their kids, sent me a text: "That's as fired up as I've seen you!"
It's because I really feel this -- we're all in this together, all doing everything we can, all of us giving it our all.
I tell you what, I'm as encouraged and as hopeful as I can remember being. So many good people, not letting anything stand in the way of doing what's right for this country. Doesn't matter what party, what part of the state, where you're from or where you're going. **We're in this together.**
For everyone in every county who came out to be with us -- whether it was the one person in Loving (thanks, Stan!), the packed house at Austin Middle School auditorium in Amarillo, the gym full of friends and neighbors in Sunnyside in Harris, the community meeting in DeSoto in Dallas, or the gathering we just had in Beaumont in Jefferson County -- or anyone in any of the other 249 counties we've been to...THANK YOU for being part of this and making this grassroots campaign so successful!
To everyone who has donated 10, or 15 or 25 bucks (or more!) THANK YOU for making sure we have the means to reach every person. To make sure that no one is taken for granted, no one is written off -- that all of us are listened to, that everyone is heard. And doing it without a dime from PACs or Super PACs. No corporations, no special interests. All people, all the time.
I am grateful.
And I am really looking forward to these next five months with you on the road, reaching
Everyone
Everywhere
Every day.
Let's do this!
Beto
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9212b/3b1d797/7f2086c0/35a85516/3647414392/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-254?refcode=ema180610-254&amount=3")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9212b/3b1d797/7f2086c0/35a85517/3647414392/VEsE/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you need to update your contact information, [ you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9212b/3b1d797/7f2086c0/35a85528/3647414392/VEsF/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9212b/3b1d797/7f2086c0/35a85529/3647414392/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: This is the result of Citizens United
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Remarkably, too much of the political and media establishment accepts this as business as usual instead of calling it what it is: a three-alarm fire.
#
Peter -
We need an anti-corruption movement in this country.
Today in America, it is the billionaires and the big corporations buying our candidates and elections while keeping the economy rigged against everyone else.
Remarkably, too much of the political and media establishment accepts this as business as usual instead of calling it what it is: a three-alarm fire. And we need to be honest about how we got here and that the way we fund our campaigns is a big part of the problem.
Because the truth is, when you encourage Super PACs and your campaigns are primarily funded by big-monied interests, it calls into question your independence.
It's hard to change a corrupt system when you take so much of its money, and in this moment in New York's history, we cannot have any doubt about our next Attorney General's independence. We must be confident that she will investigate and prosecute without fear or favor.
Now our opponents in this race will not lack for big money. But we are going to fund this campaign differently. Because that's what you deserve -- a New York State AG's office that is truly independent. But that will only happen if we are in this together.
**[Can I count on you to make a $3 donation to our campaign today as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of billionaires and big corporations buying our candidates and elections? I would not ask if it were not important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e1d/6e822e2f/1b7b1090/417216ce/3989077743/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MTAtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-anticorruption?refcode=em180610-full")**
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e1d/6e822e2f/1b7b1090/417216ce/3989077743/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MTAtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-anticorruption?refcode=em180610-full")
I've been on the leading edge of the movement against big money in politics my entire career, using the sword of the law to fight corruption.
I remember reading the Citizens United decision when it came out and knowing that it would be a disaster for our democracy. That decision threw a wrecking ball of big money at our democracy. Suddenly billionaires and big corporations were free to spend limitless amounts of money to influence politicians.
But we can build an anti-corruption movement and change that.
Justice John Paul Stevens relied on my legal arguments in his powerful dissent in Citizens United -- a dissent that can soon be the law of the land.
It's going to require electing new leaders who believe in anti-corruption politics if we're going to get big money out of politics. I was so disappointed when Democrats, as well as Republicans, got used to Citizens United and started depending on Super PACs, quietly accepting corruption.
Unfortunately, we're likely to face this limitless spending again in this race. We're up against the establishment and Wall Street.
**It 's going to be billionaires and the big corporations vs. the grassroots. But if we're in this together, they won't have a chance:**
**[Peter, can you make a $3 donation right now? This is important because our campaign depends on people like you chipping in to fund our effort.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e1d/6e822e2f/1b7b1090/417216ce/3989077743/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MTAtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-anticorruption?refcode=em180610-full")**
Thank you for everything you do.
Best,
Zephyr Teachout
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e1d/6e822e2f/1b7b1090/417216ce/3989077743/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MTAtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-anticorruption?refcode=em180610-full")

* * *

Friends --

During last night's debate, Mayor Gillum showed Floridians all across this state how a progressive leader can run -- and win -- this year.

**[Can you stand with Andrew and chip in $5 to help us build on the momentum?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3045/9e00690/463b8578/240225f0/3748034496/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-june-2018?gpsid=9_55_1157&refcode=em18_180609_PostDeb_fnd_gq_dnr__&utm_campaign=em18_180609_PostDeb_fnd_gq_dnr__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+stand+with+Andrew+and+chip+in+5+")**

Subject: Tonight's Debate

Friends --

Tonight we'll be having another debate to talk about our vision for Florida, our track records, and the big issues facing our state.

**[Records matter, and so do the facts, which is why nights like this are so critical. Can I count on you to chip in $5 and stand with me tonight?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3045/9e00690/463b8578/240225f2/3748034496/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-june-2018?gpsid=9_55_1157&refcode=em18_180609_PostDeb_fnd_gq_dnr__&utm_campaign=em18_180609_PostDeb_fnd_gq_dnr__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+Records+matter+and+so+do+the+facts+which")**

Let's bring it home!

Andrew

\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Hello --

All women deserve access to comprehensive health care and the best medical advice available from their doctors -- without needing a permission slip from Donald Trump and Mike Pence.

But the Trump administration has proposed a new policy that would cut off access to care for millions of women and would demand that doctors and clinics that receive federal funding withhold information about health care options. And if clinics like Planned Parenthood choose to put their patients first and refuse to follow the new guidance, they could be defunded.

This misguided policy is a backdoor plan to defund Planned Parenthood and will put the health of women in jeopardy. That's why I'll do everything in my power to stop it.

I recently joined 13 governors across the country in asking Alex Azar, Secretary of the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, to reject this new policy that will harm women. Now I'm asking you to join me in taking action.

**[Tell HHS Secretary Alex Azar: "Don't defund Planned Parenthood." **[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/dont-defund-planned-parenthood](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec244/73a2bc12/3a12a652/1fcda875/1812501376/VEsF/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/tell-hhs-secretary-alex-azar-don-t-defund-planned-parenthood-?gpsid=8_50_1147&source=em18_180608_fundpp_adv_gq_ful__tw&utm_campaign=em18_180608_fundpp_adv_gq_ful__tw&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=3+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomdontdefundplanned")**

Tom

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: About this weekend...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Wow, Peter.

I have to start by sending out a **heartfelt thank you** to everyone who donated, knocked on doors, and made phone calls over these past few days. If what I saw over the weekend is any indicator, the Blue Wave is real, and it's coming at full speed. There is truly nothing we can't accomplish when we **work together** like this.

Speaking of work, there's still so much we can and must do in advance of Tuesday's Democratic Primary. Make your plan to vote. Keep the primary front-of-mind for your family and friends. (Reminders never hurt!) And you can bet we'll be keeping this weekend's momentum going by continuing our GOTV efforts.

I've asked for your support a number of times in these last few months, but these last days are **the most critical we 've seen**. Our office will be busier than ever -- will you [donate today](https://act.myngp.com/el/5CriP1dqzDvpzUuDpc61dJaEE-42O8gxRV2Am7XZHzo=/Buqv827Ijtz4RpmUuh8RHtKMPTSCEGQeREN7gO0-RzU=?refcode=6_10_18) to help us cross the finish line with the resources to win?
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5CriP1dqzDvpzUuDpc61dJaEE-42O8gxRV2Am7XZHzo=/Buqv827Ijtz4RpmUuh8RHtKMPTSCEGQeREN7gO0-RzU=?refcode=6_10_18)

Coffee, office supplies, snacks to keep phone banking going... believe it or not, these are what help fuel the democratic process. That's why your donation can make such a huge difference, even this late in the game.

Thanks for everything you're doing, Peter. We can do this. Given this weekend, I've never been more certain.

-Abigail

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e5/3e0906/65c55c1f/3e343220/3601857332/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180610_1_PET_TEAM_PP-RS&source=20180610_1_PET_TEAM_PP-RS")

| | Under new rules from the Trump administration, women's health clinics will lose federal funding.

Women (and men, frankly) will get less care if these rules go into place. We have to fight back to protect Americans' access to health care.

[We're collecting 10,000 signatures to push back against this new rule so that health centers that provide life-saving care can keep their doors open. Sign our petition today >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e5/3e0906/65c55c1f/3e343227/3601857332/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Save-Planned-Parenthood?source=20180610_1_PET_TEAM_PP-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Wersquore+collecting+10000+signatures+to&utm_campaign=20180610_1_PET_TEAM_PP-RS")

This isn't just a partisan attack on Planned Parenthood - it's an attack on the more than 140 health centers right here in Virginia that rely on federal funding to provide preventive health care to people across the Commonwealth.

Health centers affected by this rule provide critical care, from cancer screenings to preventive health education, and cutting people off from life-saving information will never be an American value.

But as with many things, this could slip to the back burner of yet another chaotic news cycle. We won't let it.

[Sign your name to defend women's health clinics from losing funding due to this new partisan rule from the the Trump administration >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e5/3e0906/65c55c1f/3e343226/3601857332/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Save-Planned-Parenthood?source=20180610_1_PET_TEAM_PP-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Sign+your+name+to+defend+womenrsquos+hea&utm_campaign=20180610_1_PET_TEAM_PP-RS")

Thanks for your time,

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7NJTze3sO1NrGqJzqye-5zaynrCxiLlQdWFMsoZHeEg=/Srnzea98-4L_M6MBgH2JwPdqb-PZ94XxE1UO8IrQ4Dk=?gpsid=11_36_1136&ms=em18_180608_eqpay_adv_gq_ful__TD&refcode=em18_180608_eqpay_adv_gq_ful__TD&utm_campaign=em18_180608_eqpay_adv_gq_ful__TD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&fn=Peter&ln=&pc=66864&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&noskip=true)
Dear Peter,

For far too long in America, women have been paid less than men with the same experience and education, for the same work.

When the Equal Pay Act was passed 55 years ago, women earned only 59 cents to every dollar that men made. Now, that number is closer to 79 cents -- but that gap still means thousands of dollars in lost incomes for women every year.

**[Peter, Paul Davis knows that we have to do better. Fight for equal pay by adding your name right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/7NJTze3sO1NrGqJzqye-5zaynrCxiLlQdWFMsoZHeEg=/Srnzea98-4L_M6MBgH2JwPdqb-PZ94XxE1UO8IrQ4Dk=?gpsid=11_36_1136&ms=em18_180608_eqpay_adv_gq_ful__TD&refcode=em18_180608_eqpay_adv_gq_ful__TD&utm_campaign=em18_180608_eqpay_adv_gq_ful__TD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&fn=Peter&ln=&pc=66864&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&noskip=true)**

More and more mothers are becoming the main wage-earners for their families, so our pay gap stretches far beyond women workers. Their partners, children, and other family members are put at a disadvantage, too.

It's time for an update to the Equal Pay Act, so women will finally make the wage that they deserve.

**[Add your name now to stand up for equal pay.](https://act.myngp.com/el/7NJTze3sO1NrGqJzqye-5zaynrCxiLlQdWFMsoZHeEg=/Srnzea98-4L_M6MBgH2JwPdqb-PZ94XxE1UO8IrQ4Dk=?gpsid=11_36_1136&ms=em18_180608_eqpay_adv_gq_ful__TD&refcode=em18_180608_eqpay_adv_gq_ful__TD&utm_campaign=em18_180608_eqpay_adv_gq_ful__TD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&fn=Peter&ln=&pc=66864&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&noskip=true)**

Thank you,

Team Davis

Peter- Since World War II, America has been the leader of the free world...the unwavering champion of freedom and human rights. We're in a dangerous time now where our elected leaders are either enacting an “America Alone” strategy or remaining silent when they should be speaking out and taking action. Gov.
